query:
SELECT 
  pc.id,
  pc.city,
  p.name as partnerName,
  pc.currentProfitStage,
  pc.hasReturnedInvestment,
  CASE 
    WHEN pc.currentProfitStage = 1 THEN pc.stage1PartnerRatio
    WHEN pc.currentProfitStage = 2 AND pc.hasReturnedInvestment = 0 THEN pc.stage2APartnerRatio
    WHEN pc.currentProfitStage = 2 AND pc.hasReturnedInvestment = 1 THEN pc.stage2BPartnerRatio
    WHEN pc.currentProfitStage = 3 THEN pc.stage3PartnerRatio
    ELSE 0
  END as currentPartnerRatio
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN partners p ON pc.partnerId = p.id
WHERE pc.city = '无锡'
LIMIT 5;

    WHEN pc.currentProfitStage = 2 AND pc.hasReturnedInvestment = 1 THEN pc.stage2BPartnerRatio
    WHEN pc.currentProfitStage = 3 THEN pc.stage3PartnerRatio
